description.text: Note: see also [IRDI] 0112/2///61360_4#ADA005#001 country code. country codes defined accord. to DIN EN ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 codes. Mandatory property according to EU Machine Directive 2006/42/EC. Recommendation: property declaration as MLP is required by its semantic definition. As the property value is language independent, users are recommended to provide maximal 1 string in any language of the user’s choice.
